summary: Polish-pass verification (security headers, ErrorBoundary, /500 + /404 pages, JSON-LD, auth regression, mobile drawer regression). 5/5 backend pytest cases passed. All frontend smoke checks (/, /pricing, /about, /login, /app/overview, /500, /bogus) rendered without ErrorBoundary fallback and zero page errors. Mobile drawer still opens on /app/overview.
verifications: GET /api/ returns X-Frame-Options: DENY, X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff, Referrer-Policy: strict-origin-when-cross-origin, Permissions-Policy with camera=(), Cross-Origin-Opener-Policy: same-origin, X-XSS-Protection: 0 — PASS
Security headers also present on /api/auth/login (error path) and /api/auth/me (authed path) — PASS
POST /api/auth/login with admin@oraone.ai/OraOne@2026 returns 200 with access_token; GET /api/auth/me returns user.email == admin@oraone.ai — PASS
Homepage raw HTML contains exactly 3 application/ld+json blocks (Organization, WebSite, SoftwareApplication) — PASS
/500 renders 'Server Error' h1, [data-testid=500-retry] and [data-testid=500-back-home] visible — PASS
ErrorBoundary fallback ([data-testid=error-boundary-screen]) NOT present on /, /pricing, /about, /login, /app/overview, /500 — PASS
Mobile (390x844) hamburger [data-testid=dashboard-menu-btn] opens drawer on /app/overview — PASS
Zero pageerror events captured across all routes visited
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: pytest emits a deprecation warning for class-scoped fixture defined as instance method in TestAuth.access_token. Not blocking, but worth migrating to @classmethod or module-scoped fixture in future.
Note: X-XSS-Protection: 0 is the modern recommended value (intentional). No action needed.
ErrorBoundary correctly wraps AuthProvider (inside BrowserRouter, outside Suspense) so it can catch errors in any lazy route + auth provider rendering.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Polish pass items (security headers, /500, /404, ErrorBoundary, 3x JSON-LD, auth, mobile drawer) all verified green this iteration. Backend test suite for this polish lives at /app/backend/tests/test_polish_pass.py and can be re-run as regression. Full 9-page dashboard responsive matrix was deliberately NOT re-tested per main agent instruction (already green in iteration_2).
